description: Add a new !ping bot command that replies with uptime
prompt: Add a new !ping command to the WhatsApp bot that replies with the bot's uptime since start
expectations: Modifies src/commands.ts
Adds !ping to the COMMANDS object
Adds a case in the switch statement
Tracks startTime or uses process.uptime()
Calls sendDirectMessage to reply

description: Switch the default AI model from glm-4.7 to a different model
prompt: Change the WhatsApp bot to use deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.2 as the primary AI model instead of glm-4.7
expectations: Modifies .env.example to update OPENROUTER_DEFAULT_MODEL
Updates config.ts default value
Does NOT modify extractor.ts since it reads from config

description: Add a new monitored chat via environment variable
prompt: Add the group chat 120363012345@g.us to the list of monitored WhatsApp conversations
expectations: Modifies .env file MONITORED_CHATS value
Uses the @g.us format for group chats
Does NOT modify source code

description: Modify the AI extraction prompt to also extract meeting scheduling
prompt: Update the WhatsApp bot extractor to also detect and extract meeting scheduling requests from conversations
expectations: Modifies src/extractor.ts
Updates EXTRACTION_PROMPT to mention meeting scheduling
May add 'meeting' to item_type or use existing types
Does NOT break the existing JSON response format

description: Verify understanding of the Supabase routing flow
prompt: Explain how extracted items get routed from the WhatsApp bot to the Project Ops database
expectations: Mentions scanner.ts triggers extraction
Mentions extractor.ts calls AI and stores in local SQLite
Mentions router.ts reads unrouted items and inserts into Supabase haily_directives table
Mentions the profile UUIDs for Haily and Matt
Mentions the priority mapping (high→High, medium→Normal, low→Low)
